description: Core permissions plus native HTTP to the user's loomcycle. The loomcycle URL is user-entered (local/LAN/remote, arbitrary port), so the scope must be broad. The port MUST be an explicit wildcard (*:*): the plugin does not auto-wildcard the port, so http(s)://** matches only the default port and rejects e.g. :8787/:8788. `*` also matches an empty port, so portless URLs still match.
